ocr: HOW TO BREAK IN THE CAM:

INSTALL THE ENGINE AND FILL IT UP WITH FLUIDS. MAKE SURE THERE ARE NO AIR BUBBLES IN COOLING SYSTEM. MAKE SURE THERE ARE NO VACCUM LEAKS. YOU WANT THE ENGINE TO FIRE IMMEDIATELY AND YOU HAVE TO BRING IT UP TO 2500RPM FOR 20 MINUTES. THIS IS TO HARDEN THE CAM LOBES
ALSO, GET YOUR TIMING LIGHT ON IT RIGHT AWAY AND SET THE TIMING TO 10-12 DEGREES. THERE ARE LOTS OF VIDEOS ON HOW TO DO THIS.
